title: M6-8 duplicate lifecycle patch stop with retry repair
scope: Only duplicate Mission-derived lifecycle patches were suppressed. Payload writers, human_inbox rows, execution side effects, worktree/merge/Oracle implementers, objection BLOCK, compatibility reads, and bridges remain.

verification.command: pytest -q tests/test_m6_checkpoint_duplicate_patches.py tests/test_mission_projection.py tests/test_mission_dual_write.py tests/test_human_inbox.py tests/test_inbox_execute_e2e.py tests/test_room_disconnect_inbox_guard.py tests/test_crash_recovery.py

PYTHONPATH=src AGENT_LAB_MOCK_AGENTS=1 .venv/bin/pytest -q tests/test_mission_dual_write.py tests/test_human_inbox.py tests/test_inbox_execute_e2e.py tests/test_room_disconnect_inbox_guard.py tests/test_plan_execute.py tests/test_plan_execute_reverify_api.py tests/test_crash_recovery.py

verification.result: NOT RUN; basedpyright executable unavailable in this environment

behavior.duplicate_status_patch: Identical Mission-loop compatibility projection returns without patch_run_meta; stale phase still patches once.
behavior.duplicate_plan_patch: Idempotent approved Mission retry repairs stale plan_workflow phase/hash without appending Mission events; already-correct phase/hash is not rewritten.
behavior.mission_commit_to_row_patch: Injected exception after durable Mission approval commit was repaired by idempotent approve retry; journal bytes remained unchanged and plan phase became APPROVED.
behavior.side_effect_to_mission_commit: Injected exception after human-inbox row resolution and before gate close was repaired by retry; gate closed exactly once and prompt/options row remained resolved. This is reconciliation/idempotency, not transactional rollback.

manual_qa.surface: Minimal production-function driver through MissionApplication, projection, and human inbox dual-write bridge.
manual_qa.observed: Injected mission-commit->row-patch and side-effect->mission-commit exceptions were both followed by retry; retry_state=READY_TO_EXECUTE, plan_phase=APPROVED, journal_event_lines=2 with unique event IDs, inbox_status=resolved, resolved_gate_commit=true, open_gate_ids=[]
manual_qa.cleanup: Temporary driver fixture removed; no process started by this checkpoint. Existing PID 19951 uvicorn was pre-existing and left untouched.

startup_recovery_and_rollback.interpretation: Boot reconcile landed/rollback/quarantine paths and process-restart rollback flag path remain green; authority flags/bridges and legacy writers were not removed.
